official_name: Riigi Infosüsteemi Amet (Information System Authority of Estonia)
notes: Estonian Information System Authority. Operates X-Road (Estonia's secure data-exchange platform used globally as a reference for digital-government interoperability), Estonian eID, and Mobile-ID. Publishes the X-Road specifications and Estonian eID protocols. Most technical specs are freely accessible; participant security guidelines may be partly restricted.

data.notes: Open-source platform with free specifications at x-road.global. Adopted by 20+ countries (Finland, Iceland, etc.) as their digital-government data-exchange layer. Estonian operational/security guidance partly restricted.
